summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Harshita Chandiramani portfolio website. All major functionality verified including navigation, content display, mobile responsiveness, and design elements.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero image, 'My Portfolio' title, and bio text
Navigation menu shows all required links (About Me, Why Me, The Work, Contact)
All navigation links work correctly across pages
About page displays ABOUT ME title, bio with ikigai reference, and ikigai diagram with 4 circles
Why Me page shows correct title, 5 bullet points, and brand collage (GB, PEPSI, BVLGARI, Miss L BY LAZURD)
Work page displays category filters and all work items correctly
Category filters function properly (Enterprise Comms, Events, Social Media, Influencer, Brand Strategy, Paid Social)
Contact page shows all required contact details (phone, LinkedIn, email, location)
Footer displays logo and navigation links correctly
Logo click navigation works from both navbar and footer
'View Selected Work' button navigates to work page correctly
Mobile menu functionality works properly on mobile viewport
Design elements match requirements (creamy beige background #F5EBD7, dark navbar #4A4642, serif logo font)
All data-testid attributes present for robust testing
